message:
feat(wal-fec): add recovery audit types and decode proof structures (SS3.4.1)

Add structured types for WAL-FEC recovery auditing:

- WalFecRecoveryFallbackReason: enumeration of reasons recovery may
  fall back to SQLite-compatible truncation (missing sidecar, salt
  mismatch, insufficient symbols, decode failure, payload mismatch)
- WalFecDecodeProof: per-group audit artifact recording available vs
  required symbols, validated source/repair counts, decode outcome,
  and recovered frame numbers
- WalFecRecoveredGroup: successful recovery payload with metadata,
  recovered pages, frame numbers, db_size_pages, and decode proof
- WalFecRecoveryOutcome: final action enum (Recovered or
  TruncateBeforeGroup) for the recovery state machine

Also add BTreeMap import for ordered recovery tracking.
Update issue tracker with latest spec section progress.

Spec reference: SS3.4.1 (WAL-FEC Recovery).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
